  "findings": [
    "Unblocked soffits lack required fireblocking at concealed spaces",
    "Fire can spread undetected through unblocked soffit cavities",
    "Missing fireblocking material at soffit-to-wall and soffit-to-ceiling intersections"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install approved fireblocking material at all soffit concealed spaces",
    "Seal all penetrations and gaps with listed firestop material",
    "Request re-inspection after corrective work is complete"
  ],
  "rationale": "Unblocked soffits at rough-complete stage represent a fire safety hazard. Concealed spaces in soffits must be fireblocked to prevent the spread of fire and hot gases. The absence of fireblocking is a code violation under IRC R302 and constitutes an installed-defective condition.",
  "references": ["IRC R302"]
}
